subcodes.first_line: This is the Day whereon the hearts of them that have turned towards the Most Sublime Horizon have found tranquility and have drunk from the Kawthar of immortality [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا یوم فیه اطمئنت قلوب الذین اقبلوا الی الافق الاعلی و شربوا کوثر البقاء من
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @eulogies; reminiscences, @prayer for nearness to God, @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort
